script_catalog.description: Aggregate extracted answers with majority vote
Normalize raw problem data into prompt/eval/metadata JSONL manifests
Generate JSONL completions with a Hugging Face causal LM on Colab GPU
Probe Colab runtime capabilities and emit a JSON summary
Run LoRA SFT on Colab GPU from a JSONL training dataset
Shared config resolution, JSONL I/O, and utility helpers used across the repo.
Compare two eval runs and emit paired win/loss/flip reports
Cheap auditable constraint checks and penalty scoring helpers for tropical reranking.
Extract a canonical final integer answer from math traces
Generate self-sampled math traces or synthesize dry-run equivalents
Materialize a Colab experiment config bundle from notebook parameters
Mock external JSONL generator backend for smoke tests
Mock external training backend for smoke tests
Run math evaluation with optional tropical reranking backend
Run the A0/A1/A5 validation ladder and emit paired summaries
Build an SSD math SFT dataset package from self-generated traces
Apply tropical reranking to extracted math traces
Generate repo index, status, and summary documentation artifacts.
